title: Suspected leak — stop DIY
summary: Moisture or returning water needs diagnosis, not cosmetic repair.
warnings: New sealant does not repair a leak.
dontDo: do not seal an active leak

title: Suspected leak — checklist
summary: Secure the place and collect facts for a professional.
steps: Do not remove surfaces without diagnosis.
Call a professional if it returns.
dontDo: do not apply sealant on wet place

title: High risk — call a professional
summary: At high risk do not continue DIY repair.
warnings: The cause may be under the surface.
dontDo: do not hide the problem under grout

title: High risk — before professional
summary: Collect facts instead of doing a cosmetic repair.
steps: Do not apply material on wet base.
warnings: Cosmetic repair can hide the cause.
dontDo: do not work on wet base

title: Dirty grout — cleaning
summary: Start with gentle cleaning and a small test.

title: Dirty grout — full guide
dontDo: do not scrape tile with sharp metal

title: Old sealant — replacement
summary: Old or cracked sealant is usually better removed and replaced.
dontDo: do not apply new over old dirty layer

title: Old sealant — full replacement
warnings: If it is wet underneath, stop.
dontDo: do not use shower too early

title: Mold on sealant
summary: Surface film may be cleaned, deep stain means replacement.

title: Mold — procedure
steps: Replace sealant if stain is deep.
dontDo: do not close a wet bathroom

title: Crack — check stability
summary: Check if crack is dry and stable.

title: Crack — full assessment
summary: Decide whether repair or professional help is needed.
steps: For small dry crack choose matching material.
warnings: Filler will not repair moving base.
dontDo: do not apply material on dirt

title: Detachment — do not cover over
summary: Loose material must be removed and base prepared.

title: Detachment — full guide
summary: Prepare gap for a new layer.
steps: If it returns, find the cause.
warnings: In wet zone detachment may hide water.

title: Basic sealant or grout assessment
summary: First identify dirt, crack, mold, detachment or moisture.
steps: Stop with water or soft base.
warnings: Not every joint is a quick fix.

title: Universal sealant and grout procedure
summary: Choose cleaning, refresh, replacement or professional help.
warnings: The app does not diagnose installation.
